title: Junior Frontend Developer at Accenture India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Accenture India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Accenture India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
